117 D0100_CNDCT_MOOD_CD D0100_CNDCT_MOOD_CD D0100 Resident Mood Interview Be Conducted Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident mood interview should be conducted. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No(resident is rarely/never understood)
1=Yes
^=Blank(skip pattern)
